problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Self-assembled. Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
